## Type of Change

## Pre-Merge Checklist

- [ ] `tests/bats/bin/bats tests/` passes locally
- [ ] New script: exits 0 with empty stdin
- [ ] New script: exits 0 with valid JSON stdin
- [ ] No hardcoded paths (use `$HOME`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-visible changes
